reference: I had a laminectomy in November two thousand and fifteen for ruptured discs in my lumbar region. I was given a prescription for carisoprodol and diazepam to help with muscle spasms. I really overdid it today and am in pain. Which one would be the best option for me? I have both left over from surgery.
text: I had a laminectomy in November 2015 for ruptured discs in my lumbar region. I was given a prescription for carisopridol and diazepam to help with muscle spasms. I really overdid it today and am in pain. Which one would be the best option for me? I had both left over from surgery.
